en_title: PlayStation 'Shovelware' Crackdown Continues as Major Publisher Warns Its Games Will Soon Be Pulled
cn_title: PlayStation打击劣质游戏，发行商Webnetic宣布游戏即将下架
subtitle: 铲件末日
opus_summary: 索尼继续清理PlayStation商店中的劣质游戏（俗称“铲件”），发行商Webnetic宣布其游戏即将从商店移除。Webnetic在PS商店拥有128款独立命名的游戏，包括同一游戏的PS4和PS5版本及大量续作，总数量高达1274款，是商店中游戏数量第四多的发行商。此前索尼已移除ThiGames、GoGame Console Publisher等多家发行商的数百款游戏。Webnetic表示这并非终点，将继续在Xbox、任天堂和Steam平台发布新作。

paragraphs.en: It looks like Sony is continuing its mission to clear the PlayStation Store of 'shovelware' games after publisher Webnetic announced its "journey on PlayStation" will soon "come to an end."
paragraphs.cn: 在发行商Webnetic宣布其「PlayStation之旅」即将「画上句号」后，索尼似乎正在继续清理PlayStation商店中的「铲件」游戏。

paragraphs.en: Sony has been working on uncluttering its digital storefront over the last few months. Most of its time has been spent targeting shovelware, a term used to refer to cheaply produced and exploitative games that have been known to flood store pages with experiences often labeled as knockoffs and low-effort .
paragraphs.cn: 过去几个月里，索尼一直在努力清理其数字商店。大部分精力都用于打击「铲件」——这个术语指的是那些制作廉价、投机取巧的游戏，它们常常以山寨和低质量作品的形式充斥商店页面。

paragraphs.en: Sony removed hundreds of PlayStation Store games from publisher ThiGames in January and then to GoGame Console Publisher, VRCForge Studios, and Welding Byte in April. Now, it looks like Webnetic is next on the chopping block.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼在1月移除了发行商ThiGames的数百款PlayStation商店游戏，随后在4月又移除了GoGame Console Publisher、VRCForge Studios和Welding Byte的游戏。现在，Webnetic似乎是下一个被清理的对象。

paragraphs.en: The publisher – which is responsible for multiple versions of August 2022's The Golden Age and multiple versions of its September 2022 follow-up The Copper Age – took to its X/Twitter account to announce a new direction for its expansive catalog today. It says "these are our final days on PlayStation," ushering players to check out its games "before they're gone."
paragraphs.cn: 这家发行商——旗下拥有2022年8月《The Golden Age》的多个版本以及2022年9月续作《The Copper Age》的多个版本——今日在其X/Twitter账号上宣布了其庞大游戏目录的新方向。它表示「这是我们在PlayStation上的最后时光」，并呼吁玩家「在它们消失之前」去看看它的游戏。

paragraphs.en: "As our journey on PlayStation comes to an end, we want to thank everyone who played our games, supported our releases, and joined us along the way," Webnetic said.
paragraphs.cn: 「随着我们在PlayStation上的旅程结束，我们想感谢每一位玩过我们游戏、支持我们发布、并一路相伴的人，」Webnetic表示。

paragraphs.en: A quick look on the PlayStation Store shows that Webnetic is responsible for 128 individually named video games, including both PS4 and PS5 versions of some of the same titles and their many, many sequels. Trophy-tracker websites like TrueTrophies note that Webnetic is also listed as the publisher of versions of games for different territories.
paragraphs.cn: 快速浏览PlayStation商店可以发现，Webnetic拥有128款独立命名的游戏，包括同一作品的PS4和PS5版本以及大量续作。奖杯追踪网站TrueTrophies指出，Webnetic还被列为不同地区游戏版本的发行商。

paragraphs.en: Its 2025 game, A House That Glows, for example, shows as having eight different game options available for players to purchase and farm trophies through. Webnetic has many similar examples throughout its catalog, boosting its reported total number of PlayStation games to a breathtaking 1,274 titles. TrueTrophies names it as the publisher with the fourth most games on the digital store.
paragraphs.cn: 例如，其2025年的游戏《A House That Glows》显示有8种不同的游戏选项供玩家购买和刷奖杯。Webnetic在其目录中还有许多类似案例，使其在PlayStation上的游戏总数达到了惊人的1274款。TrueTrophies将其列为该数字商店中游戏数量第四多的发行商。

paragraphs.en: Webnetic signed off its goodbye message to PlayStation fans by saying that "this isn't the end for us." Those looking to keep up with its work were encouraged to head to Xbox, Nintendo, and Steam, where it will continue publishing "more exciting projects," including updates for Panic House: Awakening.
paragraphs.cn: Webnetic在向PlayStation粉丝告别时表示，「这并非我们的终点」。它鼓励那些希望继续关注其作品的人前往Xbox、任天堂和Steam平台，它将在那里继续发布「更多激动人心的项目」，包括《Panic House: Awakening》的更新。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear when exactly Webnetic will have its games removed from the PlayStation Store. In the meantime, you can read IGN's deep dive into the world of "Eslop" online .
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚Webnetic的游戏具体何时会从PlayStation商店移除。与此同时，你可以阅读IGN对「Eslop」世界的深度报道。
